source_files: public/locales/<lang>/loc_imprint.json for lang in de, en, fr, it, es, pt, rm
_meta.description: Legal notice / Impressum at /project/imprint. States the responsible person, contact, and one-line pointers to the code license (Apache-2.0) and data license (OpenParlData.ch, CC BY 4.0). The operator name, email, website, repo URL and license URLs are NOT in these files — they are non-translatable constants in imprint.tsx. Only the surrounding labels + the SEO metas block are localized here.
_meta.format: Each entry: context (where the string appears, its role and length/grammar constraints) + the current de/en/fr/it/es texts as translation reference. Use the context when translating into a new language; a null text means the key is missing in that language file.
_meta.generated: 2026-07-17, code-verified against app/ sources; regenerate when public/locales texts or imprint.tsx change.

imprint.title.context: Page title (h1) of the Imprint page at /project/imprint; also used as the sidebar section title via PAGE_CONFIG.NS_IMPRINT.sidebar. Short. Use the country's conventional name for a website legal notice (Impressum / Mentions légales / Note legali / Aviso legal).

imprint.nature.context: Lead paragraph under the h1: states that parlhub is a private, non-profit, independent project. Mirrors the FAQ 'official' answer; keep it one sentence.
imprint.nature.en: parlhub is a private, non-profit project. It is not affiliated with any parliament, authority or party.
imprint.nature.de: parlhub ist ein privates, gemeinnütziges Projekt. Es steht in keiner Verbindung zu einem Parlament, einer Behörde oder einer Partei.
imprint.nature.fr: parlhub est un projet privé à but non lucratif. Il n'est affilié à aucun parlement, autorité ou parti.
imprint.nature.it: parlhub è un progetto privato senza scopo di lucro. Non è affiliato ad alcun parlamento, autorità o partito.
imprint.nature.es: parlhub es un proyecto privado y sin ánimo de lucro. No está afiliado a ningún parlamento, autoridad ni partido.

imprint.operator_label.context: Definition-list term (dt) labelling the responsible person. The name itself (Wenzel Frick) is a constant in imprint.tsx, not translated. Short noun phrase, e.g. 'Responsible for content'.

imprint.contact_label.context: Definition-list term (dt) labelling the contact row (email + website). Short.

imprint.code_label.context: Definition-list term (dt) labelling the source-code row (shows 'Apache-2.0' + repo link). Short.

imprint.data_label.context: Definition-list term (dt) labelling the data row (shows 'OpenParlData.ch' + 'CC BY 4.0' links). Short.

imprint.disclaimer.context: Closing one-line liability disclaimer: content provided as is, without warranty; data shown as published by the source. Keep it terse.
imprint.disclaimer.en: Provided as is, without warranty. Data is shown as published by the source.
imprint.disclaimer.de: Bereitgestellt ohne Gewähr. Die Daten werden so angezeigt, wie sie von der Quelle veröffentlicht wurden.
imprint.disclaimer.fr: Fourni tel quel, sans garantie. Les données sont affichées telles que publiées par la source.
imprint.disclaimer.it: Fornito così com'è, senza garanzie. I dati sono mostrati come pubblicati dalla fonte.
imprint.disclaimer.es: Se ofrece tal cual, sin garantía. Los datos se muestran tal como los publica la fuente.

metas.imprint.title.context: SEO <title> for /project/imprint (metas block). Usually identical to imprint.title.

metas.imprint.desc.context: SEO meta description for /project/imprint (metas block). One sentence, ~150 chars: who runs the site, how to reach them, and the code + data licenses.
metas.imprint.desc.en: Legal notice for parlhub: who runs the site, how to get in touch, and the code and data licenses.
metas.imprint.desc.de: Impressum von parlhub: wer die Website betreibt, wie man Kontakt aufnimmt, sowie die Lizenzen für Code und Daten.
metas.imprint.desc.fr: Mentions légales de parlhub : qui gère le site, comment le contacter, et les licences du code et des données.
metas.imprint.desc.it: Note legali di parlhub: chi gestisce il sito, come mettersi in contatto e le licenze del codice e dei dati.
metas.imprint.desc.es: Aviso legal de parlhub: quién gestiona el sitio, cómo ponerse en contacto y las licencias del código y los datos.
